zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Amicia de Alfreton於1200年5月26日出生在英國藍卡爾蘭卡斯特時，她的父親Robert de Alfreton39歲，母親Agnes De VERDON23歲。她於1220年之前與Robert de Lathom在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1250年11月11日在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可享年50歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Amicia de Alfreton于1200年5月26日出生在英国藍卡爾蘭卡斯特时，她的父亲Robert de Alfreton39岁，母亲Agnes De VERDON23岁。她于1220年之前与Robert de Lathom在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 豪斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1250年11月11日在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可享年50岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Amicia de Alfreton was born on 26 May 1200, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, her father, Robert de Alfreton, was 39 and her mother, Agnes De VERDON, was 23. She married Robert de Lathom before 1220, in Lathom House, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 11 November 1250, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Amicia de Alfreton est née le 26 mai 1200, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Alfreton, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Agnes De VERDON, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Lathom avant 1220, à Lathom House, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1250, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Amicia de Alfreton am 26. Mai 1200 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Alfreton 39 und ihre Mutter Agnes De VERDON 23. Sie hat vor 1220 in Lathom House, Lancashire, England Robert de Lathom geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 11. November 1250 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Amicia de Alfreton è nata il il 26 maggio 1200 nel Lancaster, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Robert de Alfreton, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Agnes De VERDON, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Lathom prima del 1220, nel Lathom House, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 11 novembre 1250, nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Amicia de Alfretonが1200年5月26日にイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで生まれた時，父Robert de Alfretonは39歳，母Agnes De VERDONは23歳であった。1220年以前にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム ホーウゼでRobert de Lathomと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1250年11月11日にイギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクで50歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Amicia de Alfreton(이)가 1200년 5월 26일 영국 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Alfreton(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De VERDON(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1220년 이전 영국 랭카실르 래톰 허스에서 Robert de Lathom(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1250년 11월 11일 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.26 May 1200–11 November 1250: 26 de maio de 1200–11 de novembro de 1250
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Amicia de Alfreton nasceu em 26 de maio de 1200, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Alfreton, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De VERDON, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Lathom antes 1220, em Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1250, em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Amicia de Alfreton родилась 26 мая 1200 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Alfreton было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes De VERDON, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Lathom перед 1220 г. в местности латом хоус, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 11 ноября 1250 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия.

es.26 May 1200–11 November 1250: 26 de mayo de 1200–11 de noviembre de 1250
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Amicia de Alfreton nació el 26 de mayo de 1200, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Alfreton, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Agnes De VERDON, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Robert de Lathom antes de 1220, en Lathom House, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1250, en Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
